positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a glowing celestial fox (kitsune) sitting gracefully among bioluminescent flora. The fox has an ethereal, serene expression and is depicted with sharp, clean lines and strong, deep outlines. The scene uses a limited, harmonious color palette of sapphire blues, cosmic purples, and iridescent teal, accented by pops of gold luminescence. The composition is highly centered, making the fox the dominant focus, with the flora framing it naturally. The style should be vector-art inspired, with a flat, graphic quality suitable for screen printing on apparel, ensuring excellent contrast between the glowing elements and the dark background. Clean silhouettes and bold graphic elements are paramount. Highly detailed, high contrast, graphic novel style.
negative: blurry, low detail, text, signature, logo, watermark, cartoonish, photorealistic, 3d render, dirty, grain, bad anatomy, multiple subjects, extra limbs, poor composition, messy lines, gradients, noise
